PowerShell($paths = Get-Content scripts/output/pb_2024_txt_cleanup.txt; $existing = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; Write-Host "Paths in cleanup file: $\($paths.Count\)"; Write-Host "Existing on disk: $\($existing.Count\)"; if \($existing.Count -gt 0\) { $existing | Remove-Item -Force; Write-Host "Removed $\($existing.Count\) files" } else { Write-Host "Nothing to remove" })
PowerShell(python -c "import fitz, PIL, boto3, supabase; print\('fitz', fitz.__doc__.split\(\)[1] if fitz.__doc__ else '?'\); print\('all imports OK'\)")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .env.local\) { $found = @\(\); $needed = 'R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID','R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY','SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY'; foreach \($k in $needed\) { if \(Select-String -Path .env.local -Pattern "^$k=" -Quiet\) { $found += $k } }; "found in .env.local: $\($found -join ', '\)"; "missing: $\(\(Compare-Object $needed $found -PassThru\) -join ', '\)" } else { '.env.local missing' })

PowerShell($h = Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '=',2\)[1].Trim\('"'\).Trim\("'"\) }; $url = 'https://lhxhsprqoecepojrxepf.supabase.co/rest/v1/historical_protocols?select=protocol_pdf_url&year=eq.2025&inspection_type=eq.annual&protocol_pdf_url=not.is.null&limit=1'; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers @{ apikey=$h; Authorization="Bearer $h" }; $sample = $resp[0].protocol_pdf_url; "Sample URL: $sample"; "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $sample -Method Head -ErrorAction Stop; "HEAD status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Content-Length: $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\)" } catch { "HEAD error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('items:', len\(data\)\); ok=[x for x in data if x['status']=='ok']; err=[x for x in data if x['status']=='error']; sk=[x for x in data if x['status']=='skipped_existing']; print\('ok:', len\(ok\), 'err:', len\(err\), 'skipped:', len\(sk\)\)")
